response: The People Team shared the results of the Q1 employee engagement survey, which found an overall engagement score of 7.8/10, above the industry average of 7.2, with team collaboration ranking highest at 8.9/10 and career growth clarity as the lowest-scoring category at 6.1/10. To address the low career growth clarity score, three proposed actions—quarterly career conversations, an internal mobility program, and mentorship matching—will be discussed at a Friday town hall.
